STAB-025 · Funnel

Three steps to controlled agents

  1. Free sandbox — Proof Sandbox intake · one job · output + receipt
  2. Download app — Chat Unify.app 4.4 · Forge + Connect + Verify
  3. Platform runtime — Subscription from $2K/mo · cloud workers + mail mesh

GTM: download-first · Stripe checkout v1 queued — see pricing for contact path until Payment Link live.
